reason: Layer split: flow body in flows/assignTask.ts, tool helpers in tools/, prompt already in prompts/. Keep readTeamState/searchMemberCommits/getTaskDependents as reusable tool helpers, not inline in the flow.

Rule A (counter via FieldValue.increment — activeIssueCount +1/-1 on assign/reassign), Rule B (cross-doc assigneeId write + counters in runTransaction), vector search findNearest MUST carry .where('repoId','==',repoId) prefilter for searchMemberCommits, path convention apps/gitsync/repos/{repoId}/{members,tasks,commits}.
HttpsError codes for pre-checks (failed-precondition for task-already-done / no-members), best-effort vs hard-fail division; flow returns AssignmentDecision to the onCall handler.

v2-only, region asia-east1, forbidden patterns, and the OpenAI SDK path convention. NOTE: this flow uses function-calling via openai.chat.completions.create({tools, tool_choice:'auto'}) — NOT the .beta.chat.completions.parse structured-output path used by breakdownTask.
Use firebase-functions structured logger to trace each agentic round / tool call / finalize / fallback.

Reuse existing helpers: tools/embedding.ts embed() for searchMemberCommits query vector; mirror the txn+increment pattern already in tools/taskStatus.ts (markTaskDone) for the finalizeAssignment write.

Return shape must match types.ts AssignmentDecisionSchema {assigneeId, reasoning} which the frontend functions_service.dart already consumes; readTeamState joins members subcollection with users doc (identity/expertise live on users/{userId}).
